_meta.note: This is a FlowGraph chart file. Open it with the FlowGraph app to view and edit the interactive dependency flowchart.
_meta.author: Giang Tran
_meta.usage: In the app: click the folder icon (or drag-and-drop this file) to load it. Use Design Mode to edit nodes, groups, and phases.

nodes.name: Requirements
nodes.description: Gather and document project requirements from stakeholders. Define scope, success criteria, and constraints.

nodes.name: UI Design
nodes.description: Create wireframes and high-fidelity mockups. Establish design system and component library.

nodes.name: Architecture
nodes.description: Define system architecture, data models, and API contracts. Select technology stack.

nodes.name: Frontend Development
nodes.description: Build UI components and integrate with API layer based on approved designs.

nodes.name: Backend Development
nodes.description: Implement business logic, database schema, and REST/GraphQL endpoints.

nodes.name: QA Testing
nodes.description: Execute functional, regression, and performance testing. Report and verify defect fixes.

nodes.name: Deployment
nodes.description: Configure CI/CD pipeline, provision infrastructure, and deploy to production environment.
